Hackathons

Intensive collaborative events to solve real-world challenges

Hackathons

Intensive problem-solving events where innovation meets collaboration

About Our Hackathons

Our hackathons are intensive, collaborative events where participants work in teams to develop innovative solutions to real-world challenges. Over the course of 48-72 hours, teams ideate, design, and prototype their solutions, guided by industry mentors and subject matter experts.

Whether you’re a developer, designer, data scientist, or domain expert, our hackathons provide an exciting opportunity to apply your skills, learn new technologies, and connect with like-minded innovators.

Upcoming Hackathons

Cybersecurity Hackathon

Develop innovative solutions to real-world cybersecurity challenges faced by organizations today.

Fall 2025 Coming Soon
Learn More

AI with Ethics - Hackathon

Create tools and frameworks that address ethical challenges in artificial intelligence applications.

Spring 2026 Coming Soon
Learn More

SpaceApps Challenge

Build innovative solutions for space exploration, satellite technology, and Earth observation challenges.

October 4-5, 2025 Registration Open
Learn More

Why Participate in Our Hackathons?

For Participants

  • Skill Development: Apply and enhance your technical skills in a high-pressure, real-world context
  • Networking: Connect with industry professionals, mentors, and fellow participants
  • Innovation: Develop creative solutions to challenging problems
  • Prizes: Win awards, recognition, and potential funding for your ideas
  • Career Opportunities: Showcase your talents to potential employers and collaborators

For Organizations

  • Fresh Perspectives: Gain innovative solutions to your organization's challenges
  • Talent Scouting: Identify potential hires with demonstrated skills and problem-solving abilities
  • Brand Visibility: Showcase your organization's commitment to innovation and community
  • Industry Leadership: Position your organization at the forefront of technological advancement
  • Community Building: Engage with the broader technical community

Hackathon Format

Our hackathons typically follow this structure to maximize learning, collaboration, and innovation:

Kick-off & Team Formation

Introduction to the hackathon theme, challenges, and rules. Participants form diverse teams with complementary skills.

Ideation & Planning

Teams brainstorm solutions, define project scope, and create a development plan with clearly defined tasks and goals.

Development & Mentorship

Teams work on implementing their solutions with guidance from industry mentors who provide technical advice and feedback.

Iteration & Refinement

Teams refine their solutions based on mentor feedback, user testing, and technical challenges encountered.

Presentations & Judging

Teams present their solutions to a panel of judges who evaluate based on innovation, technical implementation, usability, and potential impact.

Awards & Next Steps

Winners are announced and teams receive guidance on how to further develop their solutions beyond the hackathon.

Frequently Asked Questions

Our hackathons are open to students, professionals, and enthusiasts with relevant skills and interests. Some hackathons may have specific eligibility requirements, which will be clearly stated on the event page.

No, you can register as an individual and form a team during the hackathon. We provide team formation activities at the beginning of each event to help participants find teammates with complementary skills.

Participants should bring their laptops, chargers, and any specific hardware they might need for their projects. For in-person events, consider bringing personal items for comfort during the long hours (e.g., water bottle, snacks, etc.). All major meals are typically provided.

Most of our hackathons are free to participate in, though some specialized events may have a nominal registration fee. Any associated costs will be clearly indicated on the event registration page.

Organizations interested in sponsoring hackathons or proposing specific challenges should contact our partnerships team. We offer various sponsorship packages and can work with you to design challenges that align with your organization's goals and interests.
